# Step 5: 差异表达

## 5.1 差异表达结果读取与注释

```{r}
ensure_module_result_layout("05_de")

de_raw <- read.delim(de_path, check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
if (!"gene_id" %in% colnames(de_raw)) {
  stop("4.DE_analysis/DE_results 缺少 gene_id 列")
}

de_result <- de_raw %>%
  mutate(
    gene_id = as.character(gene_id),
    ensembl_id = sub("\\.[0-9]+$", "", gene_id)
  )

anno <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  annotation_orgdb,
  keys = unique(de_result$ensembl_id),
  keytype = "ENSEMBL",
  columns = c("SYMBOL", "GENENAME", "ENTREZID")
) %>%
  distinct(ENSEMBL, .keep_all = TRUE)

de_result <- de_result %>%
  left_join(anno, by = c("ensembl_id" = "ENSEMBL")) %>%
  mutate(
    gene_label = dplyr::coalesce(SYMBOL, ensembl_id),
    # 保留当前项目既有筛选口径：nominal pvalue < 0.05 且 abs(log2FC) >= 0.58。
    # 正式发表/更严格汇报时，建议同时报告 padj/FDR < 0.05 的辅助计数和敏感性结果。
    direction = case_when(
      is.na(pvalue) | pvalue >= 0.05 | is.na(log2FoldChange) | abs(log2FoldChange) < 0.58 ~ "ns",
      log2FoldChange >= 0.58 ~ "up",
      TRUE ~ "down"
    ),
    rank_score = sign(dplyr::coalesce(log2FoldChange, 0)) * -log10(dplyr::coalesce(pvalue, 1) + 1e-300)
  ) %>%
  arrange(pvalue, desc(abs(log2FoldChange)))

sig_de <- de_result %>% filter(direction != "ns")

write.csv(de_result, "result/05_de/5_1_annotated_DE_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

## 5.2 DE 概览、火山图与 MA 图

```{r}
de_summary <- de_result %>%
  count(direction, name = "gene_count") %>%
  mutate(direction = factor(direction, levels = c("up", "down", "ns")))

write.csv(de_summary, "result/05_de/5_2_DE_summary_counts.csv", row.names = FALSE)

threshold_advisory <- data.frame(
  threshold = c(
    "pvalue_lt_0.05",
    "pvalue_lt_0.05_abs_log2fc_ge_0.58",
    "padj_lt_0.05",
    "padj_lt_0.05_abs_log2fc_ge_0.58"
  ),
  gene_count = c(
    sum(!is.na(de_result$pvalue) & de_result$pvalue < 0.05),
    sum(!is.na(de_result$pvalue) & de_result$pvalue < 0.05 & !is.na(de_result$log2FoldChange) & abs(de_result$log2FoldChange) >= 0.58),
    sum(!is.na(de_result$padj) & de_result$padj < 0.05),
    sum(!is.na(de_result$padj) & de_result$padj < 0.05 & !is.na(de_result$log2FoldChange) & abs(de_result$log2FoldChange) >= 0.58)
  ),
  note = c(
    "current nominal screening support count",
    "current main DE definition",
    "recommended FDR support count for stricter reporting",
    "recommended stricter DE support count for reporting sensitivity"
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
write.csv(threshold_advisory, "result/05_de/5_2b_threshold_advisory_counts.csv", row.names = FALSE)

de_barplot <- ggplot(de_summary, aes(x = direction, y = gene_count, fill = direction)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = viz_pal$de) +
  labs(title = "差异表达基因统计", x = NULL, y = "Gene count") +
  theme_rnaseq_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

save_plot_versions(
  de_barplot,
  primary = "result/05_de/5_3_DE_summary_barplot.pdf",
  width = 6,
  height = 4.5
)

volcano_tbl <- de_result %>%
  mutate(
    label_score = ifelse(is.na(pvalue) | is.na(log2FoldChange), 0, abs(log2FoldChange) * -log10(pvalue + 1e-300)),
    label = ifelse(direction != "ns" & rank(-label_score, ties.method = "first") <= 20, gene_label, NA)
  )

volcano_plot <- ggplot(volcano_tbl, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(pvalue + 1e-300), color = direction)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.75, size = 1.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.58, 0.58), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = label), size = 3, na.rm = TRUE, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = viz_pal$de) +
  labs(title = "差异表达火山图", x = "log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10(PValue)") +
  theme_rnaseq_bw()

save_plot_versions(
  volcano_plot,
  primary = "result/05_de/5_4_volcano_plot.pdf",
  width = 8.5,
  height = 6
)

ma_plot <- ggplot(de_result, aes(x = log10(baseMean + 1), y = log2FoldChange, color = direction)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(-0.58, 0.58), linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_color_manual(values = viz_pal$de) +
  labs(title = "差异表达 MA 图", x = "log10(baseMean + 1)", y = "log2 Fold Change") +
  theme_rnaseq_bw()

save_plot_versions(
  ma_plot,
  primary = "result/05_de/5_5_ma_plot.pdf",
  width = 8.5,
  height = 6
)
```

## 5.3 Top DE 基因热图与导出

```{r}
if (nrow(sig_de) > 0) {
  top_sig_ids <- sig_de %>%
    arrange(pvalue, desc(abs(log2FoldChange))) %>%
    slice_head(n = 50) %>%
    pull(gene_id)

  heatmap_mat <- log2(gene_exp[top_sig_ids, , drop = FALSE] + 1)
  heatmap_mat <- safe_scale_rows(heatmap_mat)
  row_labels <- de_result$gene_label[match(rownames(heatmap_mat), de_result$gene_id)]
  row_labels[is.na(row_labels)] <- rownames(heatmap_mat)[is.na(row_labels)]

  annotation_col <- data.frame(Group = sample_info[colnames(heatmap_mat), "group"])
  rownames(annotation_col) <- colnames(heatmap_mat)

  save_pheatmap_versions(
    primary = "result/05_de/5_6_top_DE_heatmap.pdf",
    width = 9,
    height = 11,
    expr = pheatmap::pheatmap(
      heatmap_mat,
      annotation_col = annotation_col,
      annotation_colors = list(Group = group_colors),
      show_rownames = TRUE,
      labels_row = row_labels,
      cluster_rows = TRUE,
      cluster_cols = TRUE,
      fontsize_row = 7,
      fontsize_col = 10,
      main = "Top 50 DE genes",
      silent = TRUE
    )
  )

  top_up <- sig_de %>%
    filter(direction == "up") %>%
    arrange(pvalue, desc(log2FoldChange))
  top_down <- sig_de %>%
    filter(direction == "down") %>%
    arrange(pvalue, log2FoldChange)

  write.csv(top_up, "result/05_de/5_7_top_upregulated_genes.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(top_down, "result/05_de/5_8_top_downregulated_genes.csv", row.names = FALSE)

  rank_tbl <- de_result %>%
    filter(!is.na(ENTREZID), !is.na(rank_score)) %>%
    group_by(ENTREZID) %>%
    slice_max(order_by = abs(rank_score), n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    arrange(desc(rank_score))

  write.table(
    rank_tbl[, c("ENTREZID", "rank_score")],
    file = "result/05_de/5_9_gene_rank_for_GSEA.rnk",
    sep = "\t",
    quote = FALSE,
    row.names = FALSE,
    col.names = FALSE
  )
} else {
  rank_tbl <- data.frame()
}
```

## 5.4 全样本敏感性分析

```{r}
full_sensitivity_summary <- data.frame()
full_de_result <- data.frame()

if (!is.null(gene_count_full) && !is.null(gene_count_mat) && !is.null(full_sample_info)) {
  full_groups <- full_sample_info[colnames(gene_count_full), "group"]
  names(full_groups) <- colnames(gene_count_full)
  full_keep_samples <- names(full_groups)[full_groups %in% c(group1_label, group2_label)]
  full_group_counts <- table(full_groups[full_keep_samples])

  if (length(full_keep_samples) >= ncol(gene_count_mat) &&
      all(c(group1_label, group2_label) %in% names(full_group_counts)) &&
      all(full_group_counts[c(group1_label, group2_label)] >= 3)) {
    full_counts <- round(gene_count_full[, full_keep_samples, drop = FALSE])
    full_condition <- factor(full_sample_info[full_keep_samples, "group"], levels = c(group1_label, group2_label))
    full_col_data <- data.frame(condition = full_condition, row.names = full_keep_samples, check.names = FALSE)

    full_dds <- DESeq2::DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = full_counts, colData = full_col_data, design = ~ condition)
    full_dds <- DESeq2::DESeq(full_dds, quiet = TRUE)
    # 敏感性分析也沿用当前项目口径：independentFiltering=FALSE 和 nominal pvalue。
    # 可用 DESeq2 默认 independent filtering / padj 作为报告中的补充稳定性证据。
    full_res <- DESeq2::results(full_dds, contrast = c("condition", group2_label, group1_label), independentFiltering = FALSE)
    full_norm <- DESeq2::counts(full_dds, normalized = TRUE)

    full_de_result <- data.frame(
      gene_id = rownames(full_res),
      sampleA = group2_label,
      sampleB = group1_label,
      baseMeanA = rowMeans(full_norm[, full_condition == group2_label, drop = FALSE]),
      baseMeanB = rowMeans(full_norm[, full_condition == group1_label, drop = FALSE]),
      baseMean = full_res$baseMean,
      log2FoldChange = full_res$log2FoldChange,
      lfcSE = full_res$lfcSE,
      stat = full_res$stat,
      pvalue = full_res$pvalue,
      padj = full_res$padj,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
      check.names = FALSE
    ) %>%
      mutate(ensembl_id = sub("\\.[0-9]+$", "", gene_id)) %>%
      left_join(anno, by = c("ensembl_id" = "ENSEMBL")) %>%
      mutate(
        gene_label = dplyr::coalesce(SYMBOL, ensembl_id),
        direction = case_when(
          is.na(pvalue) | pvalue >= 0.05 | is.na(log2FoldChange) | abs(log2FoldChange) < 0.58 ~ "ns",
          log2FoldChange >= 0.58 ~ "up",
          TRUE ~ "down"
        )
      ) %>%
      arrange(pvalue, desc(abs(log2FoldChange)))

    write.csv(full_de_result, "result/05_de/5_10_full_sample_sensitivity_DE_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)

    main_sig_ids <- unique(de_result$ensembl_id[de_result$direction != "ns"])
    full_sig_ids <- unique(full_de_result$ensembl_id[full_de_result$direction != "ns"])
    compare_tbl <- de_result %>%
      dplyr::select(ensembl_id, gene_label, main_log2FoldChange = log2FoldChange, main_pvalue = pvalue, main_padj = padj, main_direction = direction) %>%
      inner_join(
        full_de_result %>%
          dplyr::select(ensembl_id, full_log2FoldChange = log2FoldChange, full_pvalue = pvalue, full_padj = padj, full_direction = direction),
        by = "ensembl_id"
      )

    full_sensitivity_summary <- data.frame(
      metric = c(
        "main_selected_samples_n",
        "full_snapshot_samples_n",
        "main_de_genes_nominal",
        "full_de_genes_nominal",
        "overlap_de_genes_nominal",
        "main_only_de_genes_nominal",
        "full_only_de_genes_nominal",
        "log2fc_pearson_all_genes",
        "same_direction_overlap_genes"
      ),
      value = c(
        ncol(gene_count_mat),
        length(full_keep_samples),
        length(main_sig_ids),
        length(full_sig_ids),
        length(intersect(main_sig_ids, full_sig_ids)),
        length(setdiff(main_sig_ids, full_sig_ids)),
        length(setdiff(full_sig_ids, main_sig_ids)),
        safe_cor(compare_tbl$main_log2FoldChange, compare_tbl$full_log2FoldChange),
        sum(compare_tbl$ensembl_id %in% intersect(main_sig_ids, full_sig_ids) &
              compare_tbl$main_direction == compare_tbl$full_direction, na.rm = TRUE)
      ),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    write.csv(full_sensitivity_summary, "result/05_de/5_11_full_sample_sensitivity_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)
    write.csv(compare_tbl, "result/05_de/5_12_main_vs_full_de_concordance.csv", row.names = FALSE)

    concordance_plot <- compare_tbl %>%
      filter(is.finite(main_log2FoldChange), is.finite(full_log2FoldChange)) %>%
      mutate(status = case_when(
        ensembl_id %in% intersect(main_sig_ids, full_sig_ids) ~ "both_nominal_DE",
        ensembl_id %in% main_sig_ids ~ "main_only",
        ensembl_id %in% full_sig_ids ~ "full_only",
        TRUE ~ "not_nominal_DE"
      )) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = main_log2FoldChange, y = full_log2FoldChange, color = status)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.55, size = 1) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = viz_pal$neutral["dark"]) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = viz_pal$neutral["dark"]) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c(
        both_nominal_DE = unname(viz_pal$sig_status["significant"]),
        main_only = unname(viz_pal$accent["warm"]),
        full_only = unname(viz_pal$accent["green"]),
        not_nominal_DE = unname(viz_pal$neutral["mid"])
      )) +
      labs(title = "主分析 3v3 与全样本快照 DE log2FC 一致性", x = "Main selected-sample log2FC", y = "Full-snapshot log2FC") +
      theme_rnaseq_bw()

    save_plot_versions(
      concordance_plot,
      primary = "result/05_de/5_13_main_vs_full_log2fc_concordance.pdf",
      width = 7.5,
      height = 6
    )
  } else {
    full_sensitivity_summary <- data.frame(
      metric = "full_sample_sensitivity_status",
      value = "skipped_insufficient_full_snapshot_or_group_replicates",
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    write.csv(full_sensitivity_summary, "result/05_de/5_11_full_sample_sensitivity_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  }
}
```

## 5.5 全样本 DE 补充图

```{r}
if (exists("full_de_result") && is.data.frame(full_de_result) && nrow(full_de_result) > 0) {
  full_de_plot_tbl <- full_de_result %>%
    mutate(
      neg_log10_p = -log10(dplyr::coalesce(pvalue, 1) + 1e-300),
      direction = factor(direction, levels = c("up", "down", "ns"))
    )

  full_volcano <- ggplot(full_de_plot_tbl, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = neg_log10_p, color = direction)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.58, size = 1) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.58, 0.58), linetype = "dashed", color = viz_pal$neutral["dark"]) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = viz_pal$neutral["dark"]) +
    scale_color_manual(values = viz_pal$de, drop = FALSE) +
    labs(title = "全样本快照 DE 火山图", x = paste0(group2_label, " vs ", group1_label, " log2FC"), y = "-log10(pvalue)") +
    theme_rnaseq_bw()
  save_plot_versions(full_volcano, "result/05_de/5_14_full_sample_sensitivity_volcano.pdf", width = 8.5, height = 6)

  full_ma_plot <- ggplot(full_de_plot_tbl, aes(x = log10(baseMean + 1), y = log2FoldChange, color = direction)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.58, size = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(-0.58, 0, 0.58), linetype = c("dashed", "solid", "dashed"), color = viz_pal$neutral["dark"]) +
    scale_color_manual(values = viz_pal$de, drop = FALSE) +
    labs(title = "全样本快照 DE MA 图", x = "log10(baseMean + 1)", y = paste0(group2_label, " vs ", group1_label, " log2FC")) +
    theme_rnaseq_bw()
  save_plot_versions(full_ma_plot, "result/05_de/5_15_full_sample_sensitivity_MA.pdf", width = 8.5, height = 6)
}
```
